scripts.build:sidecar-win: pyinstaller -c -F --clean --name api --collect-all spacy --collect-all presidio_analyzer --collect-all presidio_image_redactor --distpath src-tauri/bin/api src-python/api.py
scripts.build:sidecar-mac-intel: pyinstaller -c -F --clean --name api_mac_intel --collect-all spacy --collect-all presidio_analyzer --collect-all presidio_image_redactor --distpath src-tauri/bin/api src-python/api.py
scripts.build:sidecar-mac-apple: pyinstaller -c -F --clean --name api_mac_apple --collect-all spacy --collect-all presidio_analyzer --collect-all presidio_image_redactor --distpath src-tauri/bin/api src-python/api.py
scripts.build:sidecar-linux: pyinstaller -c -F --clean --name api_linux --collect-all spacy --collect-all presidio_analyzer --collect-all presidio_image_redactor --distpath src-tauri/bin/api src-python/api.py
scripts.build:sidecar-all: npm run build:sidecar-win && npm run build:sidecar-mac-intel && npm run build:sidecar-mac-apple && npm run build:sidecar-linux
scripts.tauri:build: npm run build:sidecar-all && npm run tauri build
